sections.changelog:
0.2.9

  • Fix: remove misplaced auth-session endpoint (belongs on postglider.com, not mypostglider.website); update repo URLs to pg-media-vault

0.2.8

  • Add: supawp/v1/auth/session endpoint — validates Supabase JWT, sets WP auth cookie, redirects to return_to (fixes login bounce 404)

0.2.7

  • Fix: expose image URL in REST API for SearchIQ — jetpack_featured_media_url, thumbnail_url, og:image, embedded wp:featuredmedia

0.2.6

  • Fix: remove metadata transient so Check Again works immediately

0.2.4

  • Fix: flush rewrite rules; fake featured image for PHP thumbnail calls

0.2.2

  • Add pg_gallery_image CPT + sync-image endpoint
